module_header: module rr_arb4(input logic clk, input logic rst_n, input logic [3:0] req, output logic [3:0] grant);
prompt: Implement a 4-request round-robin arbiter. grant must be one-hot and is updated on each rising clock edge. After reset, requester 0 has the highest priority. When there are active requests, choose the first active requester starting just after the previously granted requester, wrapping around from 3 back to 0. If no request is active, drive grant to 0 and keep the priority pointer unchanged.
